_comment: Copy to launch-staff.config.json and fill with your real staff. role must be a valid User role (e.g. super_admin, admin, branch_manager, supervisor, doctor, therapist, nurse, receptionist, accountant, hr_manager). branchName/branchCode must match an existing branch exactly (run: npm run provision:staff:list). Omit password to auto-generate a temp one (printed once). Run --dry-run first.
